RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANTs LODI UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT, LOS BANOS UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT and VISALIA UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT's Motion To Transfer Venue is denied. CCP 394 does not apply to this mandamus action seeking equitable/injunctive relief. Venue is proper under CCP 395 because one of the defendants resides in San Francisco. The motion to change venue based on the convenience of witnesses is premature because there are no answers on file. See Easton v.
